headline: APS to Seek License Renewal for Palo Verde Generating Station’s Nuclear Units
summary: PHOENIX, March 16, 2026--Arizona Public Service has notified the Nuclear Regulatory Commission of its intent to renew operating licenses for Palo Verde Generating Station.

headline: UTES: Utilities Dashboard For March
